variant: build me a complete 12-week plan covering skin, hair and gym, with a weekly table

request.message: build me a complete 12-week plan covering skin, hair and gym, with a weekly table

response_body.response:
the system needs a few more specifics. let me build the plan manually from the coaching docs i just pulled, which is actually better for a 12-week custom arc:

---

## **12-week complete plan: skin + hair + gym**

### **phase 1: foundation (weeks 1–4)**
**goal:** repair barrier, establish consistency, build base strength.

**skin:** barrier repair mode. cleanse gently 2×/day, introduce azelaic acid 3×/week am, moisturize + spf 30+ every morning. no retinoids yet—barrier is priority.

**hair:** establish shampoo + conditioner routine 3×/week, scalp massage 5 min daily (improves circulation), trim every 4–6 weeks to remove dead ends.

**gym:** push/pull/legs split, 5 days/week. focus on form, not weight. barbell compounds: squat, deadlift, bench press, rows. 8–12 reps, 3 sets per compound. add 1–2 isolation per body part.

---

### **phase 2: activation (weeks 5–8)**
**goal:** introduce collagen-building actives, scale volume, increase strength.

**skin:** add tretinoin 0.05% 1–2×/week pm (dry skin first). introduce dermastamping 0.25mm 2×/week (not same night as retinoid). continue azelaic am. barrier still strong—this phase drives texture improvement.

**hair:** maintain routine, introduce weekly deep conditioning mask. if hair shows dryness, add leave-in conditioner. haircut check at week 6.

**gym:** same split, increase volume: 4 sets per compound, 6–12 reps. add 2–3 isolation per body part. progressive overload: +2.5–5 lb when you hit top of rep range.

---

### **phase 3: optimization (weeks 9–12)**
**goal:** maximize texture smoothing, lock in strength gains, refine aesthetics.

**skin:** increase tretinoin to 2–3×/week (if tolerated). dermastamping 2×/week. azelaic am. add niacinamide serum if texture still rough. spf non-negotiable—uv will undo collagen work.

**hair:** routine locked. consider scalp treatment if any sensitivity. haircut week 11 to refresh before the 12-week mark.

**gym:** increase to 5 sets per compound, 6–10 reps (strength focus). lateral raises + face pulls every session (rear delts = frame). calves 3×/week, heavy, slow tempo. progressive overload continues.

---

## **weekly breakdown table**

products.name: The Ordinary Azelaic Acid Suspension 10%
products.description: Azelaic acid for redness, PIH, and mild rosacea — pregnancy-safe.

products.name: The Ordinary Niacinamide 10% + Zinc 1%
products.description: 10% niacinamide for sebum control and pore appearance.

products.name: CeraVe PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion
products.description: Lightweight ceramide + niacinamide moisturizer for nightly use.

products.name: Alpecin C1 Caffeine Shampoo
products.description: Caffeine shampoo — DHT-blocker pairing with minoxidil.
